title: Apply for a licence to import or export a firearm
description: Apply to bring a firearm into Barbados or send one out of the country.
summary: Under the Firearms Act, you must have a licence before you can import a firearm into Barbados or export one out of the country.
who_can_apply: an individual with a current firearm licence
a registered firearms dealer or gunsmith
a shooting club with a club licence

items: the firearm’s make, model, calibre and serial number
the country it is coming from or going to
the name and address of the supplier or receiver
the date you plan to bring it in or send it out

items.name: Bill of sale or invoice for the firearm
Proof of payment of the application fee

fees: Fees depend on the firearm type. Pay at the Barbados Revenue Authority.
how_long: A decision usually takes 6 to 10 weeks.

options.heading: In person
content: Hand the completed Form B Application for a Licence to Import or Export a Firearm in to Police Headquarters, Roebuck Street, St. Michael.

contact.address:
Police Headquarters
Roebuck Street
St. Michael
